description: Data quality assertions and delta updates
archived_review: All requirements verified: QualityAssertion enum (NonNull, NullLimit, Unique, NumericRange, AllowedValues) fully implemented with constructors and Polars-based validation in validate_quality(); QualityReport struct with atomic JSON persistence (save_atomic, tmp-write-then-rename); DeltaUpdater struct with append_to_parquet (fresh-write and append) and append_with_schema_check methods; 7 unit tests (passing assertions, range failures, uniqueness failures, fresh-file write, append-to-existing, multi-batch preservation, schema-mismatch rejection, empty-data handling). 6 git commits touch quality.rs including a dedicated fix commit. Track complete and clean.
